beefs.title: Back to the Beginning
beefs.about: Undid revision 1363041188 by ~2026-32779-65 (talk) Instead of edit warring over your preferred version, I recommend that you go to Talk:Back to the Beginning and discuss your changes until a consensus can be reached. After all, WP:BRD exists for a reason.
quotes: Undid revision 1363041188 by ~2026-32779-65 (talk) Instead of edit warring over your preferred version, I recommend that you go to Talk:Back to the Beginning and discuss your changes until a consensus can be reached. After all, WP:BRD exists for a reason.

That would be unnecessary. The removal of poor, misleading, or biased information on Wikipedia articles is standard. Removal of such bad information doesn’t also require additions or counterpoints to be made, or a talk page made to discuss every change, as evident in this page’s edit history itself. Section has too many poor and biased examples that do not properly convey the overall reception of the concert. The section about yungblud was far too extensive and overblown, and...
Reverted 1 edit by ~2026-32779-65 (talk): If you claim it is bias, then just add another viewpoint to the section rather than blanking it

beefs.title: Keiko Fujimori
beefs.about: We already had a consensus with anythingyouwant and whispertome, and you did not participate in the discussion. Anyways, I already had a second native Peruvian source in Spanish that proves my point.
quotes: We already had a consensus with anythingyouwant and whispertome, and you did not participate in the discussion. Anyways, I already had a second native Peruvian source in Spanish that proves my point.

The info is in not “a” in the first sentence of the opening paragraph. Fujimori’s primary language is Spanish, not Japanese. Per :Template:Infobox officeholder, we can include “The person's name in their own language, if different.”
